## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. GIVEN ...
2. WHEN ...
3. THEN ... (unexpected behavior)

What should have happened instead.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots or console output if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Java version:** [e.g., 17.0.10]
- **Node version:** [e.g., 18.19.0]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 124]
- **Docker version:** [e.g., 25.0.3]

Paste relevant logs here
